title: Memory of Memorie : A Chill Story
description:
You’re not alone.
Weave the magic of focus with a girl from another world.Memory of Memorie : A Chill Story is a story-driven productivity adventure 
where you work at your desk alongside Memorie, an apprentice witch living in another world.

In a quiet room filled with gentle Celtic music, 
whenever you sit down to work, Memorie studies her magic by your side.

What used to be solitary work time 
slowly becomes something warmer — time shared with someone.

■ The more you focus, the more the story unfoldsThe game features a Pomodoro-based focus timer.
As you accumulate focused work sessions, new story chapters unlock.

Casual conversations with Memorie. 
Small changes happening in her village. 
And the “secret” she keeps hidden.

Beyond each completed session, 
a new piece of the story awaits.

■ Your focus changes her worldAs the story unfolds, Memorie’s room gradually begins to change.

Her favorite cup.
The glow of magic.
A space growing warmer and richer.

The more you dedicate yourself to your work, 
the more her world moves forward too.

■ Features• A cozy fantasy workspace with Celtic music and ambient sounds

• A Pomodoro-technique-based focus timer

Story progression tied directly to your focus time

• Unlockable magic and a room that evolves over time

• A calendar system to track your focus history

• Perfect for studying, working, or creative projects

■ The WorldThe story takes place in Elmana Village, a small settlement not far from the Imperial Capital.
Protected by the sacred “Lightroot Tree,” it is a peaceful place.

But little by little, a dark presence begins to creep into the world.

Using a spell that connects distant hearts,
Memorie found you.

Was it coincidence… or fate?

Stay focused, and see the story through to its ending — together.
description_short: A story-driven productivity adventure where you work alongside Memorie, an apprentice witch from another world. As you focus using the Pomodoro timer, the story progresses and her world gradually transforms. Turn solitary work into time shared with someone.
